# CODEMAP ŌĆö auto-generated map of this repository

> **Do not hand-edit.** Regenerated by `scripts/gen_codemap.py` on every push to `main` (`.github/workflows/codemap.yml`). To refresh locally: `python scripts/gen_codemap.py`.
>
> **Interactive graph:** [`frontend/public/codemap.html`](frontend/public/codemap.html) ŌĆö drag / zoom / click-to-focus; served at `/codemap.html` on the Vercel deploy. (The diagrams below render right here on GitHub.)
>
> Map of commit `743e30b` ┬Ę 2026-06-30T20:15:13Z

**Read this first** for a current picture of the codebase ŌĆö what lives where, and what imports what. It is the fast path to context for both humans and agents. If it looks wrong, it is stale: re-run the generator and push.

## Areas at a glance

| Area | Files | Lines | What it is |
|------|-------|-------|------------|
| **frontend** | 78 | 14,293 | Frontend ŌĆö Next.js 16 / React 19 / Tailwind (compliance matrix UI) |
| **backend** | 17 | 1,907 | Backend ŌĆö FastAPI (PDF ingest, extraction, REST API) |
| **engine** | 48 | 2,994 | Engine ŌĆö reconcile / eval / answer-draft pipeline + tests |
| **prompts** | 6 | 678 | Prompts ŌĆö LLM prompt specs (extraction, classification, answers, gaps) |
| **gold** | 4 | 219 | Eval gold-set ŌĆö hand-labelled requirements for accuracy measurement |
| **data** | 17 | 0 | Data ŌĆö tender source PDFs (not parsed here) |
| **comms** | 5 | 795 | Comms ŌĆö async agent message boards |
| **docs** | 3 | 1,663 | Docs ŌĆö plans & specs |
| **ci** | 1 | 62 | CI ŌĆö GitHub Actions |
| **tooling** | 1 | 516 | Tooling ŌĆö repo scripts (incl. this map generator) |
| **root** | 83 | 4,286 | Root ŌĆö docs, config, role briefs |

## System shape

```mermaid
graph LR
  data[tender PDFs] --> backend
  prompts[prompt specs] --> backend
  prompts --> engine
  backend[Backend API: backend/app] --> engine[Engine: reconcile, eval, answer]
  frontend[Frontend UI: frontend/src] -. HTTP .-> backend
  gold[eval gold-set] --> engine
```

*Frontend Ōåö Backend is an HTTP boundary (`frontend/src/lib/api.ts`), not an import ŌĆö shown dashed. Everything else is a real code dependency.*

### backend ŌĆö Backend ŌĆö FastAPI (PDF ingest, extraction, REST API)

- `backend/.env.example`
- `backend/DEPLOY.md`
- `backend/Dockerfile`
- `backend/README.md`
- `backend/app/__init__.py` ŌĆö Tender Breakdown backend package.
- `backend/app/chunk.py` ŌĆö page-aware overlapping chunker.
- `backend/app/extract.py` ŌĆö chunk ŌåÆ raw requirement objects.
- `backend/app/graph.py` ŌĆö relationship edges (criteria_ref ┬Ę depends_on).
- `backend/app/ingest.py` ŌĆö PDF ŌåÆ page-numbered text.
- `backend/app/main.py` ŌĆö Tender Breakdown API ŌĆö FastAPI app.
- `backend/app/pipeline.py` ŌĆö ingest ŌåÆ chunk ŌåÆ extract ŌåÆ assemble.
- `backend/app/schema.py` ŌĆö the locked data contract as Pydantic models.
- `backend/app/store.py` ŌĆö SQLite persistence (stdlib sqlite3, zero-config).
- `backend/requirements.txt`
- `backend/scripts/parse_check.py` ŌĆö hour-one tender sanity check.
- `backend/scripts/stress_test.py` ŌĆö throw real tenders at the full backend and log what breaks.
- `backend/scripts/tender-sources.txt`

### engine ŌĆö Engine ŌĆö reconcile / eval / answer-draft pipeline + tests

- `engine/.gitignore`
- `engine/README.md`
- `engine/__init__.py` ŌĆö Bidframe engine package (Generalist lane): reconcile/dedupe + eval harness.
- `engine/_io.py` ŌĆö UTF-8-safe JSON I/O. This box defaults to cp1252 (J-008 crash); never rely on it.
- `engine/answer.py` ŌĆö auditable autofill: grounded answer-draft + gap interview (Generalist lane).
- `engine/eval.py` ŌĆö Eval harness: score tool output against a hand-labelled gold set.
- `engine/eval_answers.py` ŌĆö groundedness eval for auditable autofill (Generalist lane).
- `engine/fixtures/capability/cap-001-company-profile.txt`
- `engine/fixtures/capability/cap-002-case-studies.txt`
- `engine/fixtures/capability/cap-003-policies.txt`
- `engine/gold/mock.gold.json`
- `engine/reconcile.py` ŌĆö Reconcile/dedupe ŌĆö pipeline step 5 (Generalist lane).
- `engine/requirements.txt`
- `engine/scripts/__init__.py`
- `engine/scripts/calibrate.py` ŌĆö data-driven calibration of the needs_review threshold.
- `engine/scripts/draft_answers.py` ŌĆö the auditable-autofill demo run.
- `engine/scripts/eval_all.py` ŌĆö aggregate accuracy across every labelled tender.
- `engine/scripts/run_tender.py` ŌĆö the real closed loop on a real tender.
- `engine/similarity.py` ŌĆö Swappable similarity seam. difflib char-ratio + content-token Jaccard. No embeddings.
- `engine/tests/__init__.py`
- `engine/tests/conftest.py` ŌĆö Pytest config for engine tests. Run from repo root: python -m pytest engine/tests/ -v
- `engine/tests/fixtures/eval_gold_syn.json`
- `engine/tests/fixtures/eval_output_syn.json`
- `engine/tests/fixtures/golden_final.json`
- `engine/tests/fixtures/mock_raw_extraction.json`
- `engine/tests/test_adversarial_safety.py` ŌĆö Adversarial trust-invariant suite ŌĆö a judge-style attack battery on the four
- `engine/tests/test_answer.py`
- `engine/tests/test_assign_ids.py`
- `engine/tests/test_autofill_wiring.py` ŌĆö Integration: auditable autofill is wired into the live API (generalist lane).
- `engine/tests/test_calibrate.py`
- `engine/tests/test_draft_concurrency.py` ŌĆö draft_all parallelism: drafting concurrently must be byte-identical to sequential.
- `engine/tests/test_end_to_end.py`
- `engine/tests/test_eval_all.py`
- `engine/tests/test_eval_answers.py` ŌĆö Groundedness eval ŌĆö turns "the autofill never bluffs" into an auditable number.
- `engine/tests/test_eval_gold_csv.py`
- `engine/tests/test_eval_integration.py` ŌĆö The closed Generalist loop: reconcile(mock raw) -> score vs mock.gold.json.
- `engine/tests/test_eval_match.py`
- `engine/tests/test_eval_metrics.py`
- `engine/tests/test_eval_report.py`
- `engine/tests/test_gap_questions.py` ŌĆö Sharper gap questions: the OpenAI answerer phrases the gap interview via J's
- `engine/tests/test_grouping.py`
- `engine/tests/test_io.py`
- `engine/tests/test_merge.py`
- `engine/tests/test_pipeline_wiring.py` ŌĆö Integration: the backend pipeline now uses the generalist engine for reconcile + routing.
- `engine/tests/test_real_data_robustness.py` ŌĆö Robustness against real extractor output (regression for the SPSO run).
- `engine/tests/test_report.py`
- `engine/tests/test_similarity.py`
- `engine/tests/test_to_final.py`
